title: serrafalcus racemosus
intro: Serrafalcus racemosus, also known as the Indian mastich, is a plant species native to the Indian subcontinent and parts of Southeast Asia, belonging to the family Annonaceae. The medicinal properties of Serrafalcus racemosus include its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which have been used to treat various health conditions. The health benefits of this plant include its ability to reduce inflammation, alleviate respiratory issues, and support digestive health. Serrafalcus racemosus is often used in herbal preparations such as infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which can be consumed to reap its medicinal benefits.
